Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Class PallyconDrmSessionManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager
    public class PallyconDrmSessionManager
extends java.lang.Object
implements com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager
    A DrmSessionManager that supports playbacks using ExoMediaDrm.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
      Builder for PallyconDrmSessionManager instances.
      static class  PallyconDrmSessionManager.MissingSchemeDataException
      Signals that the Format.drmInitData passed to acquireSession(android.os.Looper, com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionEventListener.EventDispatcher, com.google.android.exoplayer2.Format) does not contain scheme data for the required UUID.
      static interface  PallyconDrmSessionManager.Mode
      Determines the action to be done after a session acquired.

      • MODE_PLAYBACK

        public static final int MODE_PLAYBACK
        Loads and refreshes (if necessary) a license for playback. Supports streaming and offline licenses.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

        public static final int MODE_QUERY

    • Constructor Detail

      • PallyconDrmSessionManager

        public PallyconDrmSessionManager​(java.util.UUID uuid,
                                 com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.ExoMediaDrm.Provider exoMediaDrmProvider,
                                 com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.MediaDrmCallback callback,
                                 java.util.HashMap<java.lang.String,​java.lang.String> keyRequestParameters,
                                 boolean multiSession,
                                 @com.google.android.exoplayer2.C.TrackType int[] useDrmSessionsForClearContentTrackTypes,
                                 boolean playClearSamplesWithoutKeys,
                                 com.google.android.exoplayer2.upstream.LoadErrorHandlingPolicy loadErrorHandlingPolicy,
                                 long sessionKeepaliveMs,
                                 android.content.Context context,
                                 android.net.Uri uri,
                                 java.lang.String cid,
                                 java.lang.String siteId,
                                 android.os.Handler eventHandler,
                                 PallyconEventListener eventListener)
        Parameters:
        uuid - The UUID of the drm scheme.
        exoMediaDrmProvider - An underlying ExoMediaDrm for use by the manager.
        callback - Performs key and provisioning requests.
        keyRequestParameters - An optional map of parameters to pass as the last argument to ExoMediaDrm.getKeyRequest(byte[], List, int, HashMap). May be null.
        multiSession - A boolean that specify whether multiple key session support is enabled. Default is false.
        useDrmSessionsForClearContentTrackTypes - clear content track types.
        playClearSamplesWithoutKeys - play clear samples without keys.
        loadErrorHandlingPolicy - load error handling policy.
        sessionKeepaliveMs - session keep alive
        context - Context
        uri - Content Uri
        cid - Content ID
        siteId - Site ID
        eventHandler - event Handler
        eventListener - event Listener

    • Method Detail

      • setMode

        public void setMode​(@Mode
                    int mode,
                    @Nullable
                    byte[] offlineLicenseKeySetId)
        Sets the mode, which determines the role of sessions acquired from the instance. This must be called before acquireSession(Looper, DrmSessionEventListener.EventDispatcher, Format) is called.

        By default, the mode is MODE_PLAYBACK and a streaming license is requested when required.

        mode must be one of these:

        • MODE_PLAYBACK: If offlineLicenseKeySetId is null then a streaming license is requested. Otherwise, the offline license is restored.
        • MODE_QUERY: offlineLicenseKeySetId cannot be null. The offline license is restored to allow its status to be queried.
        • MODE_DOWNLOAD: If offlineLicenseKeySetId is null then an offline license is requested. Otherwise, the offline license is renewed.
        • MODE_RELEASE: offlineLicenseKeySetId cannot be null. The offline license is released.
        Parameters:
        mode - The mode to be set.
        offlineLicenseKeySetId - The key set id of the license to be used with the given mode.

      • prepare

        public final void prepare()
        Specified by:
        prepare in interface com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager
